nasb.text: Therefore when we could endure it no longer, we thought it best to be left behind at Athens alone,

esv.text: Therefore when we could bear it no longer, we were willing to be left behind at Athens alone,

cnv.text: 我們既然不能再忍下去，就決定留在雅典，

ccb.text: 最后我们无法再忍受思念之苦，就决定我们这些人留在雅典，

csbs.text: 所以，我们既然不能再等了，就决意单独留在雅典，
